spine.label: Assessment
spine.definition: A scored behavioural / competency assessment establishes the working signal.

spine.label: Evidence Collection
spine.definition: Evidence accrues into the longitudinal record (one datapoint per cycle).

spine.label: AI Interpretation
spine.definition: AI interprets signals/competencies into an explainable diagnosis.

spine.label: Intervention
spine.definition: A targeted intervention is delivered for the diagnosed gap.

spine.label: Learning
spine.definition: A personalised learning / development plan is composed and surfaced.

spine.label: Practice
spine.definition: Practice / activities are surfaced for the learner to act on.

spine.label: Reassessment
spine.definition: Interval / exit re-administration of the existing assessment (close-the-loop).

spine.label: Improvement
spine.definition: Improvement is validated against the prior datapoint(s) as a longitudinal trend.

spine.label: Measured Outcome
spine.definition: A realized, MEASURABLE outcome is captured into the canonical outcome ledger.

spine.label: KPI Update
spine.definition: The measured outcome rolls up into the individual / persona / lifecycle / business KPIs.

spine.label: Continuous Optimization
spine.definition: The loop re-enters: KPIs inform the next cycle from the new baseline.

outcome_types.label: Assessment Completion
outcome_types.definition: A subject completes a scored assessment (the entry datapoint of every outcome chain).

outcome_types.label: Diagnosis Delivered
outcome_types.definition: An explainable AI diagnosis is surfaced from the scored signal/competency profile.

outcome_types.label: Recommendation Engagement
outcome_types.definition: A growth recommendation is generated and surfaced for the diagnosed gap.

outcome_types.label: Intervention Uptake
outcome_types.definition: A targeted intervention is delivered (uptake inferred from intervention substrate).
outcome_types.statusNote: Intervention delivery substrate exists; explicit per-subject uptake telemetry is recommendation/intervention-inferred (no separate completion log) â€” Coverageâź‚Adoption.

outcome_types.label: Learning Progress
outcome_types.definition: Movement on the longitudinal record after a learning/practice cycle.

outcome_types.label: Competency / EI Improvement
outcome_types.definition: A measured uplift in a competency / EI dimension vs the baseline.

outcome_types.label: Readiness Uplift
outcome_types.definition: A measured rise in the readiness band over the readiness history.

outcome_types.label: Reassessment Completed
outcome_types.definition: A subject re-administers the assessment (>1 longitudinal datapoint â€” close-the-loop).
outcome_types.statusNote: Reassessment signal MECHANISM present (getReassessmentSignal); real re-administration volume is ADOPTION-pending (Coverageâź‚Adoption, nullâ‰ 0).

outcome_types.label: Stage Promotion
outcome_types.definition: The subject advances a lifecycle stage (Curiosityâ†’Insightâ†’Growthâ†’Mastery).
outcome_types.statusNote: Promotion is readiness-DERIVED (evidence-gate band) recorded in wc3_stage_progression, not a uniformly enforced gate â€” Coverage present, ADOPTION usage-driven.

outcome_types.label: Realized Outcome
outcome_types.definition: A realized career/hiring/development outcome (placement, role progression, hire, direction chosen).
outcome_types.statusNote: Canonical ledger present (validation_loop_outcomes via MX-102X + Phase 1.3 capture); realized-outcome volume is the universal adoption-gated tail.

outcome_types.label: Mastery Achievement
outcome_types.definition: A reached-mastery milestone is captured (terminal coded-ladder outcome + loop re-entry).
outcome_types.statusNote: reached_mastery capture MECHANISM present (progression-outcome-capture); realized mastery volume is honest-low/0 (Adoptionâź‚Coverage, nullâ‰ 0).

kpi_families.label: Individual KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Per-subject growth measures (readiness score, improvement delta, completion).

kpi_families.label: Persona KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Per-persona success metrics rolled up across subjects of a persona.
kpi_families.statusNote: Persona roll-up via READ-TIME join (capadex_user_profiles.persona âź‚ validation_loop_outcomes); k-anon suppressed; no persona dimension added to the ledger â€” Coverage present, volume adoption-gated.

kpi_families.label: Lifecycle KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Stage distribution + promotion / progression rates across the coded ladder.

kpi_families.label: Assessment KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Assessment throughput, coverage and reassessment rate.

kpi_families.label: Journey KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Funnel conversion / drop-off / outcome-tail completion across the journey.
kpi_families.statusNote: Journey substrate present (validation_loop_outcomes + journey-tail); conversion KPIs are adoption-gated (real volume) â€” Coverageâź‚Adoption.

kpi_families.label: AI KPIs
kpi_families.statusNote: Diagnosis/recommendation substrate present; acceptance/effectiveness is ABSTAINED â€” no decision-time prediction recorded (Confidence axis, honest-null), never fabricated.

kpi_families.label: Business KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Placement / hiring conversion + commercial outcomes (revenue reported separately).
kpi_families.statusNote: Placement/hiring realized via validation_loop_outcomes; revenue lives in the SEPARATE commerce ledger (capadex_payments) and is NOT composited into outcome KPIs â€” Coverage present, accuracy/volume adoption-gated.

kpi_families.label: Organizational KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Cohort movement + institute / batch coverage (k-anon aggregate).
kpi_families.statusNote: Real k-anon aggregation (MX-302H); scores masked below k_min, roster always shown.

kpi_families.label: Platform KPIs
kpi_families.definition: Active users / retention / engagement rolled up by the analytics engine.
kpi_families.statusNote: Analytics KPI substrate present (anl_kpi_daily/anl_cohort_analysis); population is adoption-driven (real volume) â€” Coverageâź‚Adoption, nullâ‰ 0.

lifecycle_rules.label: Curiosity
lifecycle_rules.measurableOutcome: A scored baseline + first AI diagnosis exist (the entry outcome of every chain).
lifecycle_rules.statusNote: Entry â†’ baseline â†’ diagnosis is the most mature outcome segment.

lifecycle_rules.label: Insight
lifecycle_rules.measurableOutcome: A recommendation + learning/intervention plan is generated and acted on.
lifecycle_rules.statusNote: Recommendation + learning + intervention generation is well-supported (reused engines).

lifecycle_rules.label: Growth
lifecycle_rules.measurableOutcome: A reassessment validates improvement vs the baseline; a realized outcome is captured.
lifecycle_rules.statusNote: Reassessment + improvement MECHANISM present (Phase 1.3 reuse + longitudinal trend); validation is ADOPTION-pending (>1 non-demo datapoint). Coverageâź‚Adoptionâź‚Confidence never composited.

lifecycle_rules.label: Mastery
lifecycle_rules.measurableOutcome: A reached-mastery + realized outcome is captured; the optimization loop re-enters.
lifecycle_rules.statusNote: reached_mastery + exit-eligibility MECHANISM present (progression-outcome-capture + getReassessmentSignal). Continuous re-entry cadence is adoption-gated; realized mastery volume honest-low/0 (Adoptionâź‚Coverage, nullâ‰ 0).

paths.label: Student â†’ Career Growth

paths.recommendationEffectiveness: Recommendation substrate present (development_recommendations); calibrated effectiveness abstained until volume (Confidence axis, honest-null).

paths.statusNote: Real k-anon aggregation (MX-302H) â€” scores masked below k_min, roster always shown. Realized cohort-outcome tail adoption-gated.

decisions.rationale: Realized outcomes are captured by EXISTING engines (outcome-intelligence-engine â†’ validation_loop_outcomes, Phase-1.3 progression-outcome-capture); KPIs are computed by the EXISTING enterprise-analytics + benchmark + mei/employability engines. This phase adds ONE read-only composer/registry, never a parallel outcome or KPI engine.

KPI families roll up over the existing anl_kpi_daily/anl_cohort_analysis/anl_benchmark_snapshot substrate + benchmark/mei/employability engines. No second KPI engine, no new KPI table. Population is adoption-driven (Coverageâź‚Adoption, nullâ‰ 0).

No decision-time prediction is recorded (predicted_prob_at_decision is NULL by design), so calibrated effectiveness/accuracy of the recommendationâ†’outcome and interventionâ†’outcome links is honestly ABSTAINED (Confidence axis), distinct from Coverage. Never fabricate effectiveness before the data exists.

Realized outcomes write to the EXISTING canonical ledger (validation_loop_outcomes) via reuse of MX-102X + Phase-1.3 capture, gated by longitudinalOutcomeCapture â†’ byte-identical OFF. No new outcome table, no new DDL.

Revenue lives in the SEPARATE commerce ledger (capadex_payments) and is reported on its own axis â€” never composited into outcome/growth KPIs. Business KPIs here mean placement/hiring realized outcomes, not money.

recommendation.note: Substrate counts are MEASURED (Coverage); effectiveness_rate is ABSTAINED (null) because no decision-time prediction is recorded â€” a rate here would be fabricated. Confidenceâź‚Coverage, nullâ‰ 0.

intervention.note: Substrate counts are MEASURED (Coverage); effectiveness_rate is ABSTAINED (null) because no decision-time prediction is recorded â€” a rate here would be fabricated. Confidenceâź‚Coverage, nullâ‰ 0.

effectiveness.note: Recommendationâ†’outcome and interventionâ†’outcome EFFECTIVENESS. The substrate (recommendations, interventions, realized outcomes) is MEASURED; calibrated effectiveness is deliberately ABSTAINED (no decision-time prediction substrate â€” Confidence axis). null = unreadable / abstained, 0 = measured-empty. Demo subjects excluded. No engine is invoked; nothing fabricated.

gaps.title: Calibrated recommendation/intervention â†’ outcome effectiveness is deliberately abstained
gaps.evidence: recommendation/intervention rows carry NO decision-time prediction (predicted_prob_at_decision is NULL by design), so empirical effectiveness/accuracy of the recommendationâ†’outcome and interventionâ†’outcome links cannot be calibrated yet. This is a CONFIDENCE-axis abstention, honestly reported as null â€” NOT a fabricated rate.
gaps.remediation: FUTURE/ADDITIVE: once real non-demo outcome volume + a decision-time prediction substrate exist, compute effectiveness/calibration over the EXISTING ledger (validation_loop_outcomes). Never fabricate effectiveness before the data exists. Not Launch-Critical.

gaps.title: Per-persona KPI roll-up is a read-time join, not a persisted persona dimension
gaps.evidence: persona KPIs are computed by JOINING validation_loop_outcomes to capadex_user_profiles.persona at READ time; the outcome ledger has no persona column, so per-persona counts depend on the join being readable + kâ‰Ąk_min. Coverage present; this is a deliberate zero-DDL choice.
gaps.remediation: OPTIONAL/ADDITIVE: if a persisted persona dimension is later required, REUSE the existing profile substrate via a materialized read-model (no change to the canonical ledger). Low priority.

gaps.title: Platform / organizational KPI population depends on analytics adoption
gaps.evidence: platform/organizational KPI families roll up over anl_kpi_daily/anl_cohort_analysis, whose population is adoption-driven (real volume). The substrate + computing engine exist (Coverage); current values are honest-low/0 (Adoptionâź‚Coverage, nullâ‰ 0).
gaps.remediation: FUTURE: as real usage accrues, the existing enterprise-analytics engine populates the KPI substrate â€” no new engine required. Reported on the Adoption axis, never as an engineering gap.

resolved_gaps.title: Universal realized-outcome capture into the canonical ledger
resolved_gaps.closure: PRESENT via REUSE (MX-102X + Phase 1.3): outcome-intelligence-engine + captureProgressionOutcome/captureJourneyTailMilestone write realized outcomes (placement/hire/progression/mastery/engagement) into validation_loop_outcomes. Gated by longitudinalOutcomeCapture â†’ byte-identical OFF. No new engine/table/DDL.
resolved_gaps.residual: ADOPTION: real realized-outcome volume is usage-driven (honest-low/0; reported by composeOutcomeAdoption â€” Adoptionâź‚Coverage, nullâ‰ 0).

resolved_gaps.title: KPI computation substrate (enterprise analytics + benchmark + scoring)
resolved_gaps.closure: PRESENT via REUSE: the existing enterprise-analytics (anl_kpi_daily/anl_cohort_analysis/anl_benchmark_snapshot) + benchmark/mei/employability scoring engines compute the 10 KPI families. The composer READS coverage of this substrate; it never re-computes a KPI or builds a second KPI engine.
resolved_gaps.residual: ADOPTION: KPI population is usage-driven (Coverageâź‚Adoption, nullâ‰ 0).

resolved_gaps.title: Longitudinal improvement-validation substrate
resolved_gaps.closure: PRESENT via REUSE: longitudinal-memory + wc3 longitudinal-foundation record the trend that validates improvement vs baseline (the measured-outcome input). The composer READS it, never re-derives.
resolved_gaps.residual: CONFIDENCE + ADOPTION: improvement is measurable once >1 non-demo datapoint exists; calibrated accuracy is abstained by design (Coverageâź‚Confidenceâź‚Adoption, nullâ‰ 0).

decisions.rationale: Realized outcomes are captured by EXISTING engines (outcome-intelligence-engine â†’ validation_loop_outcomes, Phase-1.3 progression-outcome-capture); KPIs are computed by the EXISTING enterprise-analytics + benchmark + mei/employability engines. This phase adds ONE read-only composer/registry, never a parallel outcome or KPI engine.

KPI families roll up over the existing anl_kpi_daily/anl_cohort_analysis/anl_benchmark_snapshot substrate + benchmark/mei/employability engines. No second KPI engine, no new KPI table. Population is adoption-driven (Coverageâź‚Adoption, nullâ‰ 0).

No decision-time prediction is recorded (predicted_prob_at_decision is NULL by design), so calibrated effectiveness/accuracy of the recommendationâ†’outcome and interventionâ†’outcome links is honestly ABSTAINED (Confidence axis), distinct from Coverage. Never fabricate effectiveness before the data exists.

Realized outcomes write to the EXISTING canonical ledger (validation_loop_outcomes) via reuse of MX-102X + Phase-1.3 capture, gated by longitudinalOutcomeCapture â†’ byte-identical OFF. No new outcome table, no new DDL.

Revenue lives in the SEPARATE commerce ledger (capadex_payments) and is reported on its own axis â€” never composited into outcome/growth KPIs. Business KPIs here mean placement/hiring realized outcomes, not money.

enterprise_ready.note: ONE canonical Outcome & KPI Model answers "assessment â†’ intervention â†’ MEASURABLE OUTCOME â†’ KPI": a FROZEN 12-step outcome spine (Assessmentâ†’Evidenceâ†’AIâ†’Recommendâ†’Interveneâ†’Learnâ†’Practiceâ†’Reassessâ†’Improveâ†’Measured-Outcomeâ†’KPI-Updateâ†’Continuous-Optimization), 11 outcome-tracking types, 10 KPI families, four per-lifecycle-stage outcome rules and a per-persona path register â€” every field mapped to the eight outcome/KPI axes and verified against the live repo. The chain is mechanism-complete via REUSE-before-build: MX-102X outcome-intelligence + Phase-1.3 progression-outcome-capture write realized outcomes into validation_loop_outcomes; the existing enterprise-analytics + benchmark + mei/employability engines compute the KPI families. This phase adds ONE read-only composer/registry + ZERO new outcome/KPI logic + ZERO schema. OPEN engineering gaps are NONE Launch-Critical (GAP-O1 Medium: calibrated effectiveness deliberately abstained; GAP-O2 Low: persona KPI is a read-time join not a ledger dimension; GAP-O3 Future: platform KPI population is adoption-driven). The dominant remaining axes are CONFIDENCE (calibrated effectiveness, abstained until volume + prediction substrate) and ADOPTION (real outcome/KPI volume, currently honest-low/0, reported SEPARATELY) â€” usage/data axes, NOT gaps. The verdict stays STRUCTURAL (engineering complete via reuse; adoption/confidence are data-driven and never fabricated). Coverageâź‚Confidenceâź‚Outcomeâź‚Adoption are reported separately and never composited; nullâ‰ 0.

adoption.note: ADOPTION axis only â€” exercise of the (reuse-instrumented) assessmentâ†’outcomeâ†’KPI loop. SEPARATE from Coverage; never composited. null = unreadable, 0 = measured-empty. Demo subjects excluded. Capture is gated by longitudinalOutcomeCapture; KPI population by the enterprise-analytics engine â€” this phase builds NO new outcome/KPI machinery.

persona_linkage.note: Personaâź‚Outcome linkage validated by a READ-TIME join (no persona column added, zero DDL). Per-persona counts below k_min are suppressed (masked) for anonymity. linkage_present:false means the join was unreadable, NOT that outcomes are zero (nullâ‰ 0). Coverageâź‚Outcomeâź‚Confidence never composited.
